title: Introduction
content:
### What is JavaScript?

**JavaScript** is the **#1 programming language** of the web. It powers over **98% of websites** and runs in every modern browser.

---

### What Can It Do?

- **Build interactive web pages** -- animations, forms, games
- **Calculate and manipulate data** -- right in the browser
- **Validate user input** -- before sending to server
- **Update HTML and CSS** -- live, without reloading
- **Server-side apps** -- using **Node.js**

---

### Why Learn JavaScript?

| Reason | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| **Universal** | Works in every browser, on every device |
| **Beginner Friendly** | Easy syntax, instant results |
| **Huge Community** | Millions of developers, countless libraries |
| **Versatile** | Frontend, backend, mobile, desktop |

---

> **Fun Fact:** JavaScript was created in just **10 days** by Brendan Eich in 1995.

quiz.question: What is JavaScript primarily used for?
